name: Stir Fry Lentils and Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat.
2. Add the diced onion and celery to the pan. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are softened and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms to the pan. Cook, stirring frequently, until they have released their moisture and are mostly cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Stir in the cooked red lentils, adzuki beans, mung bean sprouts, and water chestnuts.
5. Pour in the tamari sauce, marjoram, nutmeg, garlic powder, and onion powder. Mix well to combine all ingredients evenly.
6. Continue cooking over medium heat for another 5 minutes, stirring frequently until everything is heated through and the flavors are well combined.
This recipe remains faithful to the original while ensuring clear instructions and proper ingredient listing.
